testsuite.name: TestCases.CheckoutCompletePageTest

testcase.name: verifyCheckoutCompleteLbel2Test
testcase.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :- Thank you for your order!

testcase.name: verifyCheckoutCompleteLabel3Test
testcase.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :-Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there!

testsuite.system-out: Checkout Page3 Label :-Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there! Checkout Page3 Label :- Thank you for your order! Checkout Page3 Label :- Checkout: Complete! URL of checkout :- https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
